name: walletguard-pro
description: Open-source Web3 wallet security suite. Real transaction simulation, MEV detection, calldata decoding, approval scanner (ERC-20+NFT), phishing detection, address book. 9 chains. Zero API keys. MIT licensed.

scripts.test: node test-typosquat.js && node test-integration.js && node test-multichain.js && node test-nft.js && node test-revoke.js && node test-build.js && node test-i18n.js && node test-onboarding.js && node test-simulator-v2.js && node test-address-book.js && node test-eip7702.js && node test-session-key.js && node test-threat-feed.js && node test-wallet-dna.js && node test-drainer-detector.js && node test-visual-phish.js && node test-hw-wallet.js && node test-explain.js && node test-safe-multisig.js
